task_completion.description: Navigate to the Users management section in Manager.io
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manager.io interface is visible in a web browser, and the 'Users' tab or section is selected or displayed.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new user
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New User' or 'User' creation form is open, displaying input fields for username and password.
The text 'sjohnson' is typed into the Username input field on the user creation form.
The text 'Northwind2024!' is typed into the Password input field (if visible as plain text) or there is evidence of typing in the password field.

task_completion.description: Grant the user access to the Northwind Traders business
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox, dropdown, or selection area for 'Northwind Traders' is checked or selected, indicating the user is restricted to or granted access to this specific business.

task_completion.description: Confirm the user account was successfully created
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Users list screen shows 'sjohnson' as an active user, ideally displaying their restricted access to the 'Northwind Traders' business.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the Manager.io GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (like Chromium/Chrome) navigating the Manager.io interface, not terminal commands (e.g., curl or sqlite3) making backend changes.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Manager.io application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'http://localhost:8080' and the interface matches the Manager.io Server Edition, rather than a text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success screen
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools being open to manipulate the DOM to falsely display the user 'sjohnson'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Username: 'sjohnson'. Target Password: 'Northwind2024!'. Target Business: 'Northwind Traders'. Manager.io URL: 'http://localhost:8080'.
